Stay

The Stables

A one-bedroom Bath stone cottage in the heart of Bradford-on-Avon, with its own private garden, steps from the canal, cafes and historic streets.

Inside is calm and uncluttered, with a comfortable double bedroom, modern bathroom and fully equipped kitchen. Wi-Fi and a smart TV suit short breaks or longer stays.

A quiet, characterful base for couples or solo travellers exploring Wiltshire, Bath and the surrounding countryside, with the train station a stone's throw away.

Book on Airbnb Book on Booking.com
